pages.text: $(bold)There are seasons.$()$(br2)$(item)Serene Seasons$() is active. Spring, summer, autumn, winter. Foliage shifts, temperature shifts, weather shifts. Each in-game season lasts about a week of real time.$(br2)You'll feel it before you see it on a calendar.

$(bold)What it means for farming.$()$(br2)Crops $(thing)grow at different rates$() depending on the season and the temperature where they're planted. Some won't grow at all in winter.$(br2)Plant accordingly. Or build a greenhouse — covered, warm farms shrug off the cold.

$(bold)What it means for travel.$()$(br2)Snow and ice show up in places they don't in vanilla. Rivers can freeze. Lakes can turn slick.$(br2)Plan for it. A warm coat would help, if a mod added one — none did. Just dress the part with whatever you build.
